title: Rocket Man
why_this_song: Present continuous narration from an astronaut's point of view. Great for introducing time-expression vocabulary and 'burn out' idioms.
grammar_callouts: present simple for habits: she packs my bags

Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "long" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "long" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "think" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "think" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She packed my bags last night, pre-flight
It's just my job five days a week

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: In fact, it's cold as hell

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Rocket Man" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Rocket Man", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Rocket Man" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Rocket Man" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Rocket Man", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Rocket Man", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Lyrical imagery around space — teach the vocabulary clusters (Mars, kite, high, fuse). Strong narrative voice for retell exercises.

lines: Rocket man, burning out his fuse up here alone
And I think it's gonna be a long, long time
'Til touchdown brings me 'round again to find
